docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,021.00 FILED BY VALENCIA TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT CHATMAN KIMBERLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-05-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF AUG-31-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHATMAN KIMBERLY
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHATMAN KIMBERLY
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $398.75 AS TO DEFENDANT CHATMAN KIMBERLY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALENCIA TERESA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHATMAN KIMBERLY $371.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $371.00, FOR VCR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INADVERTENTLY ASSIGNED TO JUDGE CHOPPELAS. SHOULD HAVE BEEN ASSIGNED TO JUDGE COLBERT.
